# Heading

> Heading is a question bank, mock-exam engine, and A320 systems reference for commercial pilot exam preparation. It targets the EASA Part-FCL and Indian DGCA theoretical syllabi (ATPL/CPL) and A320 type-rating prep, with adaptive spaced repetition, timed mock papers with negative marking, VIVA oral practice, and per-syllabus readiness analytics.

Heading is a single-page web app (also installable as a PWA). Authenticated study features (dashboard, question bank, mock exams, analytics) live behind sign-in; the pages below are the public, indexable entry points.

## Product

- [A320 Systems](https://www.heading380.in/a320-systems): Interactive cockpit-grade reference — ATA chapters, ECAM logic, and schematics you can study from or quiz against.
- [Try a Free Question](https://www.heading380.in/qotd): One high-fidelity pilot theory question daily with instant diagnostic feedback — no account required.
- [Pricing](https://www.heading380.in/pricing): Free Cadet tier and Captain (Pro) subscription, monthly or annual.

## Exam Preparation Guides

- [DGCA CPL Exam Prep](https://www.heading380.in/exams/dgca-cpl): Mock papers, syllabus coverage, and study diagnostics for the Indian DGCA Commercial Pilot Licence theory papers.
- [DGCA ATPL Exam Prep](https://www.heading380.in/exams/dgca-atpl): Full syllabus preparation for DGCA Airline Transport Pilot Licence theoretical knowledge examinations.
- [EASA ATPL Exam Prep](https://www.heading380.in/exams/easa-atpl): Comprehensive study guides and simulations for all 14 EASA Part-FCL ATPL subjects.
- [FAA Knowledge Tests](https://www.heading380.in/exams/faa-written): Practice for FAA Private, Instrument, and Commercial Pilot knowledge tests aligned with current ACS.
- [A320 Type Rating Prep](https://www.heading380.in/exams/a320-type-rating): ATA chapter questions, ECAM abnormal logic, and FCOM procedure prep for A320 type rating ground exams.

## Company

- [About](https://www.heading380.in/about): What Heading is and who it is built for.
- [Blog](https://www.heading380.in/blog): Ground-school theory tips and exam-prep articles.
- [Contact](https://www.heading380.in/contact): Support and enquiries.
